description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc sanity checks that runs on push to feature/sanity-checks-for-github-ci and on pull requests to master. Run four ubuntu-22.04 jobs in parallel with different configurations: GCC C++03 Linux STL, GCC C++03 Linux No STL, GCC C++03 Linux STL Force C++03, and GCC C++03 Linux No STL Force C++03. Each job checks out the repository, fetches the latest changes, sets up GCC and G++, runs cmake with specific flags, checks the GCC version, and builds with make.
